scripts.type:check: tsc --noEmit && npm run type:check -w @break-that-ice/frontend && npm run type:check -w @break-that-ice/backend && npm run type:check -w @break-that-ice/shared
scripts.quality: npm run type:check && npm run lint:check && npm run format:check
scripts.build:app:clear: npm run build:clear -w @break-that-ice/backend && npm run build:clear -w @break-that-ice/frontend
scripts.build:app: npm run build -w @break-that-ice/backend && npm run build -w @break-that-ice/frontend
